gui.stones.leaderboard.title: Hall of Resonance
gui.stones.leaderboard.hint_boxes_2: reach Top 3 for a Legacy Box!
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.1: Lift up the Stone and you will find me there...
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.2: The void does not speak; it only reflects what you dare to bring into it.
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.3: A soul without a link is a flame casting shadows on an empty wall.
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.4: That which is below is like that which is above, but here, the mirror is shattered.
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.5: Whatever is born of truth does not die.
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.6: If you bring forth what is within you, what you bring forth will save you.
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.7: Do not seek the light outside the vessel, for the spark sleeps within the clay.
gui.stones.shrine.whisper.8: You knock on the door of the unwritten, but your ink is made of dust.
chat.stones.shrine.resonance_overload: §8§oThe frequency shifts... your grip on reality slips.
milestone.stones.storm_caller.name: Storm Caller
milestone.stones.storm_caller.descriptio: Accumulate static energy with each strike. When capacity is reached, release a massive lightning strike upon your enemies.
milestone.stones.aeon_core.name: Aeon Core
milestone.stones.aeon_core.description: A relic that resonates with your very soul. Its power evolves as your experience grows.
milestone.stones.berserker.name: Berserker
milestone.stones.berserker.description: The weaker your body, the stronger your spirit. Deal massive damage at low health and heal through the blood of your enemies.
milestone.stones.void_walker.name: Void Walker
milestone.stones.void_walker.description: Dashing through the void. Kills during the spirit phase grant invisibility and speed.
milestone.stones.drowned_warrior.name: Drowned Warrior
milestone.stones.drowned_warrior.descrip: Channel the crushing pressure of the deep. Your strikes consume oxygen to deal massive damage.
milestone.stones.pyromancer.name: Pyromancer
milestone.stones.pyromancer.description: Harness the essence of the Nether. Shoot fireballs that grow faster as you gain power. Level 50+: Release a heat wave on cast.
milestone.stones.gamblers_ruin.name: Gambler's Ruin
milestone.stones.gamblers_ruin.descripti: The ultimate high-stakes gamble. Sacrifice your gear's power for devastating strikes. At level 60, you become a 'High Roller'.
milestone.stones.gladiator.name: Gladiator
milestone.stones.gladiator.description: Each hit increases your combo and damage. Stay in the fight to maintain the chain!
milestone.stones.gravity_well.name: Gravity Well
milestone.stones.gravity_well.descriptio: Collapses space around you, pulling enemies in and crushing them with gravitational force.
milestone.stones.master_prospector.name: Master Prospector
milestone.stones.master_prospector.descr: Send out a deep-earth resonance pulse. Ores will be highlighted with a cubic soul-outline, even through the thickest stone.
milestone.stones.midas_touch.name: Midas Touch
milestone.stones.midas_touch.description: Transforms stone into precious ores based on Luck and Socket Level. Costs XP instantly; the result follows after an alchemical delay.
milestone.stones.necromancer.name: Necromancer
milestone.stones.necromancer.description: Harvest souls of fallen enemies. Efficiency increases with your power and the purity of the shrine.
milestone.stones.night_hunter.name: Night Hunter
milestone.stones.night_hunter.descriptio: Convert darkness into strength. You are weakened during the day, but strike with supernatural power at night.
milestone.stones.phoenix.name: Phoenix
milestone.stones.phoenix.description: The flames are your ally. While burning, you deal massive damage. When on the brink of death, you are reborn from the ashes.
milestone.stones.glacial_thrust.name: Glacial Thrust
milestone.stones.glacial_thrust.descript: Unleash an arcane wave of cold. Enemies in the vicinity are frozen and take frost damage. The range scales with the purity of your shrine.
tooltip.stones.resonance_desc1: Place this box to claim your
subtitles.stones.shrine_ambient: ᛗᛟᚾᚨᛞᛟᛊ ☉ — ⲡⲗⲏⲣⲱⲙⲁ ⲧⲟⲩ ⲫⲱⲧⲟⲥ ... ᚦᛖ ᚢᚾᚲᚾᛟᚹᚾ ᚠᚨᚦᛖᚱ ᚹᚺᛁᛊᛈᛖᚱᛊ ᛁᚾ ᚦᛖ ᛊᛁᛚᛖᚾᚲᛖ
tooltip.stones.amplify.2: the effects of all this stone's properties.
